objective: Run the preregistered M3 rewriting-first Qwen3-14B program autonomously through the 128-record task-construction smoke, matched 4K screen, gated 16K confirmation, and optional 46K extension only if the frozen 16K promotion gate passes. Diagnose and repair recoverable implementation or infrastructure failures without routine user sign-off. Stay within the existing $100 API and $100 GPU caps; do not launch Tier 3 detectors or raise either cap.
wake_policy: terminal transitions plus the existing 90-minute safety audit; ordinary and coarse progress remains zero-token

monitored_runs.purpose: Complete and validate 2,048 surface-divergent Gemini/Claude rewrite inputs with independent Qwen3-32B verification. Exclude the defective v1 artifact. If the current v2 worker ends partial, launch the frozen recovery-v3 config exactly once against only missing identities; it adds explicit protected-literal inventory, measured token-count guidance, and a 12-attempt feedback chain without weakening any acceptance gate.

Resume from the 333 preserved identities and generate four valid pinned Qwen3-14B baseline-draft candidates for each of the 819 frozen baseline-rewrite identities. Protocol v2 deterministically skips empty or replacement-character candidates under a 12-attempt cap and has a 300-minute timeout. At 819, bind the terminal candidate SHA and launch Qwen3-32B verification.
